title: Search for New Cars - Positive Flow
preconditions: The user is logged in to the CarWale app. | The 'New Car' tab is selected.
test_steps: Open the CarWale app. | Tap on the 'New Car' tab. | Enter 'New Cars' in the search input field. | Tap on the 'FIND CAR' button.
expected_result: The search results for 'New Cars' should be displayed.

title: Search for New Cars - Negative Flow - Empty Search
preconditions: The user is logged in to the CarWale app. | The 'New Car' tab is selected.
test_steps: Open the CarWale app. | Tap on the 'New Car' tab. | Enter an empty string in the search input field. | Tap on the 'FIND CAR' button.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that a search term is required.

title: Search for New Cars - Negative Flow - Invalid Input
preconditions: The user is logged in to the CarWale app. | The 'New Car' tab is selected.
test_steps: Open the CarWale app. | Tap on the 'New Car' tab. | Enter '1234567890' in the search input field. | Tap on the 'FIND CAR' button.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating that the search term is invalid.

title: Search for New Cars - Negative Flow - No Results
preconditions: The user is logged in to the CarWale app. | The 'New Car' tab is selected.
test_steps: Open the CarWale app. | Tap on the 'New Car' tab. | Enter 'Luxury Cars' in the search input field. | Tap on the 'FIND CAR' button.
expected_result: If no results are found, an appropriate message should be displayed.

title: Search for New Cars - UI Test - Search Input Field
preconditions: The user is logged in to the CarWale app. | The 'New Car' tab is selected.
test_steps: Open the CarWale app. | Tap on the 'New Car' tab. | Enter 'New Cars' in the search input field.
expected_result: The search input field should highlight the entered text.

title: Search for New Cars - UI Test - Find Car Button
preconditions: The user is logged in to the CarWale app. | The 'New Car' tab is selected.
test_steps: Open the CarWale app. | Tap on the 'New Car' tab. | Enter 'New Cars' in the search input field. | Tap on the 'FIND CAR' button.
expected_result: The 'FIND CAR' button should change its appearance to indicate it has been pressed.

title: Search for New Cars - Accessibility Test
preconditions: The user is logged in to the CarWale app. | The 'New Car' tab is selected.
test_steps: Open the CarWale app. | Tap on the 'New Car' tab. | Enter 'New Cars' in the search input field. | Tap on the 'FIND CAR' button.
expected_result: The screen should be accessible to users with visual impairments using screen readers.
